input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.14.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.14.2.1
            TITLE: penalties may be applied to the endurance and/or efficiency events based on:

            CONTENT:
            rule D.14.2.1: Penalties may be applied to the Endurance and/or Efficiency events based on:
D.14.2.1 Penalties may be applied to the Endurance and/or Efficiency events based on:  
a. Infractions or issues during the Endurance Event (including D.12.10.4.d) 
b. Post Endurance Technical Inspection  
c. (EV only) Energy Meter violations  EV.3.3, EV.3.5.2

final_answer: Penalties may be applied to the Endurance and/or Efficiency events based on: a. Infractions or issues during the Endurance Event (including D.12.10.4.d) b. Post Endurance Technical Inspection c. (EV only) Energy Meter violations EV.3.3, EV.3.5.2
